BuildData.description: BuildData is written during package create to track details of the created package.

aggregateChecksum.description: Checksum of a checksums.txt file that contains checksums all the layers within the package.

architecture.description: The architecture this package was created on.

differential.description: Whether this package was created with differential components.

differentialPackageVersion.description: Version of a previously built package used as the basis for creating this differential package.

flavor.description: The flavor of Zarf used to build this package.

hostname.description: The machine name that created this package.

migrations.description: Any migrations that have been run on this package.

provenanceFiles.description: ProvenanceFiles lists files present in the package that are not included in checksums.txt. These are files added after checksum generation (e.g., signature files).

registryOverrides.description: Any registry domains that were overridden on package create when pulling images.

timestamp.description: The timestamp when this package was created.

user.description: The username who created this package.

version.description: The version of Zarf used to build this package.

versionRequirements.description: Requirements for specific Zarf versions needed to deploy this package.

Chart.description: Chart defines a helm chart to be deployed.

git.description: The Git repository where the chart is stored.

helmRepository.description: The Helm repository where the chart is stored.

local.description: The local path where the chart is stored.

name.description: The name of the chart within Zarf; note that this must be unique and does not need to be the same as the name in the chart repository.

namespace.description: The namespace to deploy the chart to.

oci.description: The OCI registry where the chart is stored.

releaseName.description: The name of the Helm release to create (defaults to the Zarf name of the chart).

serverSideApply.description: Controls whether Helm uses Server-Side Apply (SSA) or client-side apply (CSA) when deploying this chart. Defaults to "auto" when omitted.

skipSchemaValidation.description: Skip validation of the chart's values against its JSON schema. Defaults to false.

skipWait.description: Whether to skip waiting for chart resources to be ready before continuing.

values.description: List of value sources mapped to their Helm override targets.

valuesFiles.description: List of values files to include in the package; these will be merged together when deployed.

ChartValue.description: ChartValue maps a values source path to a Helm chart target path.

excludePaths.description: Paths under sourcePath to omit when mapping to the target. Each path must be a descendant of sourcePath.

sourcePath.description: The source path for the value.

targetPath.description: The target path within the Helm chart values.

Component.description: Component is the primary functional grouping of assets to deploy by Zarf.

actions.description: Custom commands to run at various stages of a package lifecycle.

charts.description: Helm charts to install during package deploy.

description.description: Message to include during package deploy describing the purpose of this component.

files.description: Files or folders to place on disk during package deployment.

imageArchives.description: List of tar archives of images to include in the package.

images.description: List of OCI images to include in the package.

import.description: Import a component from another Zarf component config.

manifests.description: Kubernetes manifests to be included in a generated Helm chart on package deploy.

optional.description: Do not install this component unless explicitly requested. Defaults to false, meaning the component is required.

repositories.description: List of git repositories to include in the package.

selector.description: Filter when this component is included during package creation based on architecture or flavor.

service.description: The Zarf CLI service this component provides, such as the registry, injector, or agent.

stateAccess.description:
Groups of sensitive .State fields this component may access in Go templates (manifests, files, actions with template: true).
Valid values: "registryCredentials", "gitCredentials", "agentCerts".

target.description: Filter when this component is deployed based on OS.

ComponentAction.description: ComponentAction represents a single action to run during a Zarf package operation.

cmd.description: The command to run. Must specify either cmd or wait for the action to do anything.

description.description: Description of the action to be displayed during package execution instead of the command.

dir.description: The working directory to run the command in (default is CWD).

enableTemplating.description: EnableTemplating enables go-template processing on the cmd field.

env.description: Additional environment variables to set for the command.

maxTotalSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for the command (default 0, no timeout for cmd actions and 300, 5 minutes for wait actions).

retries.description: Retry the command if it fails up to a given number of times (default 0).

setValues.description: An array of values to set with the output of the command.

shell.description: Indicates a preference for a shell for the provided cmd.

silent.description: Hide the output of the command during package deployment (default false).

wait.description: Wait for a condition to be met before continuing.

ComponentActionDefaults.description: ComponentActionDefaults sets the default configs for child actions.

maxTotalSeconds.description: Default timeout in seconds for commands (default 0, no timeout).

retries.description: Retry commands a given number of times if they fail (default 0).

shell.description: Indicates a preference for a shell for the provided cmd to be executed in on supported operating systems.

silent.description: Hide the output of commands during execution (default false).

ComponentActionSet.description: ComponentActionSet is a set of actions to run during a Zarf package operation.

before.description: Actions to run at the start of an operation.

defaults.description: Default configuration for all actions in this set.

onFailure.description: Actions to run if any operation in this set fails.

onSuccess.description: Actions to run at the end of an operation if it succeeds.

ComponentActionWait.description: ComponentActionWait specifies a condition to wait for before continuing.

cluster.description: Wait for a condition to be met in the cluster before continuing. Only one of cluster or network can be specified.

network.description: Wait for a condition to be met on the network before continuing. Only one of cluster or network can be specified.

ComponentActionWaitCluster.description: ComponentActionWaitCluster specifies a cluster-level condition to wait for.

condition.description: The condition or jsonpath state to wait for; defaults to kstatus readiness checks.

kind.description: The kind of resource to wait for.

name.description: The name of the resource or selector to wait for.

namespace.description: The namespace of the resource to wait for.

ComponentActionWaitNetwork.description: ComponentActionWaitNetwork specifies a network-level condition to wait for.

code.description: The HTTP status code to wait for if using http or https.

ComponentActions.description: ComponentActions are ActionSets that map to different Zarf package operations.

onCreate.description: Actions to run during package creation.

onDeploy.description: Actions to run during package deployment.

onRemove.description: Actions to run during package removal.

ComponentImport.description: ComponentImport is a reference to imported Zarf component configs.

local.description: Local file path references to component config files to import.

remote.description: OCI URL references to remote component config files to import; pulled at create time.

ComponentImportLocal.description: ComponentImportLocal is a local file path reference to a component config.

path.description: The local file path to the component config.

ComponentImportRemote.description: ComponentImportRemote is a remote OCI URL reference to a component config.

url.description: The OCI URL of the remote component config.

ComponentSelector.description: ComponentSelector filters a component for inclusion at package create time.

architecture.description: Only include component for the given package architecture.

flavor.description: Only include this component when a matching '--flavor' is specified on 'zarf package create'.

ComponentTarget.description: ComponentTarget filters a component to only apply for a given local OS at deploy time.

os.description: Only deploy component to specified OS.

File.description: File defines a file to deploy.

checksum.description: Optional checksum of the file in the format <algorithm>:<checksum> (e.g. sha256:abc123). Defaults to sha256 if no algorithm is specified.

destination.description: The absolute or relative path where the file or folder should be copied to during package deploy.

enableTemplating.description: EnableTemplating enables go-template processing on this file during deploy.

executable.description: Determines if the file should be made executable during package deploy.

extractPath.description: Local folder or file to be extracted from a 'source' archive.

source.description: Local folder or file path or remote URL to pull into the package.

symlinks.description: List of symlinks to create during package deploy.

GitRef.description: GitRef selects a single Git reference.

GitSource.description: GitSource represents a Helm chart stored in a Git repository.

path.description: The subdirectory containing the chart within a Git repo.

ref.description: The Git reference to check out. Required for charts.

url.description: The URL of the Git repository where the Helm chart is stored. Must not contain an @ref suffix.

HelmRepositorySource.description: HelmRepositorySource represents a Helm chart stored in a Helm repository.

name.description: The name of a chart within a Helm repository.

url.description: The URL of the chart repository where the Helm chart is stored.

version.description: The version of the chart in the Helm repository.

Image.description: Image defines an OCI image to include in the package.

source.description: The source to pull the image from. Defaults to "registry".

ImageArchive.description: ImageArchive defines a tar archive of images to include in the package.

images.description: The list of images contained in the archive.

path.description: The path to the tar archive.

KustomizeManifest.description: KustomizeManifest defines kustomization settings for a manifest.

allowAnyDirectory.description: Allow traversing directory above the current directory if needed for kustomization.

enablePlugins.description: Enable kustomize plugins when building manifests.

files.description: List of local kustomization paths or remote URLs to include in the package.

LocalSource.description: LocalSource represents a Helm chart stored locally.

path.description: The path to a local chart's folder or .tgz archive.

Manifest.description: Manifest defines raw manifests Zarf will deploy as a helm chart.

enableTemplating.description: EnableTemplating enables go-template processing on these manifests during deploy.

files.description: List of local K8s YAML files or remote URLs to deploy (in order).

name.description: A name to give this collection of manifests; this will become the name of the dynamically-created helm chart.

namespace.description: The namespace to deploy the manifests to.

serverSideApply.description: Controls whether Server-Side Apply (SSA) or client-side apply (CSA) is used during deploy. Defaults to "auto" when omitted.

skipWait.description: Whether to skip waiting for manifest resources to be ready before continuing.

OCIRef.description: OCIRef selects a single OCI reference.

digest.description: The OCI digest, in the form sha256:<sha>.

OCISource.description: OCISource represents a Helm chart stored in an OCI registry.

ref.description: The OCI reference to pull. Exactly one of Ref.Tag or Ref.Digest must be set.

url.description: The URL of the OCI registry where the Helm chart is stored.

PackageMetadata.description: PackageMetadata holds information about the package.

annotations.description: Annotations are key-value pairs that can be used to store metadata about the package.

architecture.description: The target cluster architecture for this package.

description.description: Additional information about this Zarf package.

name.description: Name to identify this Zarf package.

preventNamespaceOverride.description: Prevent namespace overrides for this package.

version.description: Generic string set by a package author to track the package version.

Repository.description: Repository defines a git repository to include in the package.

ref.description: The Git reference to mirror. Optional; when unset, all branches and tags are mirrored.

url.description: The URL of the git repository.

SetValue.description: SetValue declares a value that can be set during a package deploy.

key.description: Key represents which value to assign to.

type.description: Type declares the kind of data being stored in the value. Defaults to "string" when omitted.

Shell.description: Shell represents the desired shell to use for a given command.

Values.description: Values defines values files and schema for templating and overriding Helm values.

files.description: List of values file paths to include.

schema.description: Path to a JSON schema file for validating values.

ValuesFile.description: ValuesFile is a values file merged into a Helm chart on deploy.

enableTemplating.description: Render Zarf template values in the file at deploy time before merging it.

path.description: Local path or remote URL of the values file.

VersionRequirement.description: VersionRequirement specifies a minimum Zarf version needed and the reason for the requirement.

reason.description: The reason this version is required.

version.description: The minimum version of Zarf required.

description: Package is the top-level structure of a Zarf package definition.

apiVersion.description: The API version of the Zarf package.

components.description: List of components to deploy in this package.

documentation.description: Documentation files included in the package.

values.description: Values imports Zarf values files for templating and overriding Helm values.
